menu.title: 📋 GO BLOX Bot Menu
menu.description: Select a feature from the buttons below:
menu.noAccess: ❌ You don't have access to any features.

errors.noAccess: ❌ You don't have access to any features.
errors.buttonError: ❌ **Button Error**: An error occurred while processing your button click.\n\nPlease try again or contact an administrator.
errors.modalError: ❌ **Modal Error**: An error occurred while processing your form submission.\n\nPlease try again or contact an administrator.
errors.selectionError: ❌ **Selection Error**: An error occurred while processing your selection.\n\nPlease try again or contact an administrator.

levelUp.title: 🎉 Level Up!
levelUp.dmMessage: 🎉 **Congratulations!** You've reached **Level {level}** in **{server}**!\n\nKeep up the great work! 🚀

errors.notRegistered: ⚠️ This server is not registered with the bot. Please run a sync first.
errors.memberNotFound: ❌ Failed to fetch member information. Please try again.
errors.noData: ⚠️ No leveling data found for this member.
errors.createRecordFailed: ❌ Failed to create member record. Please try again.

current.title: ⏸️ You are currently AFK
current.howToRemoveValue: • Click the button below to remove AFK\n• Send any message (auto-removes AFK and unmutes)\n• AFK removal will automatically unmute you if bot muted you

set.title: ✅ AFK Status Set!
set.howToRemoveValue: • Send any message (auto-removes AFK and unmutes)\n• Click AFK button and remove (will unmute if bot muted you)\n• Removing AFK automatically unmutes you if you were muted by the bot
set.voiceMutedDeafened: \n\nYou will be muted and deafened in voice.
set.voiceMutedOnly: \n\nYou will be muted in voice (not deafened).

removed.title: ✅ AFK Status Removed!
removed.description: Welcome back! Your AFK status has been removed.

modal.messagePlaceholder: e.g., Taking a break, Studying, etc.
modal.deafenPlaceholder: yes or no (leave empty for yes)

messages.welcomeBack: ✅ Welcome back, {member}! Your AFK status has been removed.

create.title: 🎉 Create Giveaway
create.step1Description: Select roles that can enter this giveaway from the dropdown below. Leave empty or click "Continue to Form" to allow all roles.

active.title: 🎉 Active Giveaway Found
active.description:
You already have an active giveaway:

**{title}**
**Prize:** {prize}

What would you like to do?

created.title: ✅ Giveaway Created!
created.description: Your giveaway has been created and posted in {channel}!

entered.title: ✅ Entered Giveaway!
entered.description: You have successfully entered the giveaway! Good luck! 🍀

cancelled.title: ✅ Giveaway Cancelled

finished.title: ✅ Giveaway Finished
finished.description: Your giveaway **"{title}"** has been finished early.{extra}
finished.noEntriesEmbed: **{title}**\n\n❌ No entries! The giveaway has ended with no participants.
finished.warning: ⚠️ *Only {count} winner{plural} selected ({requested} requested) due to limited entries.*\n\n

errors.activeExists: ❌ You already have an active giveaway. Please cancel or finish it first.
errors.invalidDuration: ❌ **Invalid Giveaway**\n\nDuration must be a positive number (in minutes).
errors.invalidWinnerCount: ❌ **Invalid Giveaway**\n\nWinner count must be a positive number.
errors.channelNotConfigured: ❌ Failed to create giveaway: Giveaway channel not configured. Please configure it in the panel.
errors.channelNotFound: ❌ Failed to create giveaway: Giveaway channel not found.
errors.channelError: ❌ Failed to create giveaway: Error retrieving giveaway channel configuration.
errors.notFound: ❌ Giveaway not found or has already ended.
errors.roleRestriction:
❌ **Role Restriction**

This giveaway is restricted to the following roles:
{roles}

You need all of these roles to enter.
errors.memberNotFoundDB: ❌ Member not found in database. Please try again later.
errors.cannotEnterOwn: ❌ You cannot enter your own giveaway!
errors.alreadyEntered: ❌ You have already entered this giveaway!
errors.cancelOwnOnly: ❌ You can only cancel your own giveaways.
errors.finishOwnOnly: ❌ You can only finish your own giveaways.

modal.title: 💬 Submit Feedback
modal.label: Your Feedback
modal.placeholder: Please share your feedback, suggestions, or concerns...

submitted.title: ✅ Feedback Submitted!
submitted.description: Thank you for your feedback! Your submission has been received.

errors.channelError: ❌ Failed to submit feedback: Error retrieving feedback channel configuration.
errors.channelNotConfigured: ❌ Failed to submit feedback: Feedback channel not configured.
errors.channelNotFound: ❌ Failed to submit feedback: Feedback channel not found.

existing.title: 💎 Custom Supporter Role
existing.description: You already have a custom role: **{roleName}**\n\nChoose an action:

created.title: ✅ Custom Supporter Role Created!
created.description: Your custom role **{roleName}** has been created and assigned to you!{iconWarning}
created.iconWarningBoost: \n\n⚠️ **Custom Icon Not Available:** This server needs Level 2 Server Boost to use custom role icons (images). You can use an emoji instead!
created.iconWarningGeneric: \n\n⚠️ **Note:** Icon could not be set, but role was created successfully.

updated.title: ✅ Custom Supporter Role Updated!
updated.description: Your custom role **{roleName}** has been updated!{iconWarning}
updated.iconWarningBoost: \n\n⚠️ **Custom Icon Not Available:** This server needs Level 2 Server Boost to use custom role icons (images). You can use an emoji instead!
updated.iconWarningGeneric: \n\n⚠️ **Note:** Icon could not be set, but role was updated successfully.

deleted.title: ✅ Custom Supporter Role Deleted
deleted.description: Your custom role **{roleName}** has been deleted.

errors.noRole: ❌ You don't have a custom role to edit.
errors.noRoleDelete: ❌ You don't have a custom role to delete.
errors.invalidName: ❌ **Invalid Role Name**\n\nRole name must be between 1 and 100 characters.
errors.boostRequired:
❌ **Custom Icon Not Available**

This server needs **Level 2 Server Boost** to use custom role icons (images).

💡 **Tip:** You can use an **emoji** instead (like 🔥, ⭐, or any custom emoji) which doesn't require server boosts.
errors.boostRequiredCreate:
❌ **Server Boost Required**

This server needs **Level 2 Server Boost** to create custom supporter roles with certain features.

💡 **What you can do:**
- Ask server administrators to boost the server to Level 2
- Or contact server staff for assistance

**Error details:** {error}
errors.createFailed:
❌ **Failed to Create Role**

Error: {error}

Please make sure:
- The bot has permission to create roles
- The bot has permission to manage roles
- Role position constraints are valid
errors.updateFailed:
❌ **Failed to Update Role**

Error: {error}

Please make sure:
- The bot has permission to manage roles
- Role constraints are valid
errors.failed: ❌ Failed to open role creation form: {error}
